case_title: FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC VS. PATRICK GREEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC ON DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK
DECLARATION RE DAILY RENTAL VALUE: $45 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1420 TURK ST, #PH1D, S.F. CA. 94115, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILLMORE PROPERTIES, LLC SERVED MAR-05-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GREEN, PATRICK
